info.title: German Power Consumption
info.subtitle: Power Consumption in Germany from 2015 to 2026
info.description: ENTSO-E Transparency Platform gives access to electricity generation, transportation, and consumption data for the pan-European market. Part of this data is provided by the various transmission system operators (TSOs) accross Europe. This is Power Consumption of Germany from 2015 to the present. **Acknowledgements:** This data is publicly available via [ENTSO-E transparency platform](https://transparency.entsoe.eu/). Photo by Andrey Metelev on Unsplash
